xmldoc.short_description: Returns enumeration member names for a classdef enumeration class.

param_input_item.param_description: an enumeration class name as a string

description.p: enumeration returns the public enumeration members declared by a classdef class.
Enumeration members can be accessed as ClassName.MemberName.
Enumeration members can pass constructor arguments; stored properties initialized by the constructor are copied to the member value.

example_item.example_item_description: Use constructor arguments in enumeration members.
